+++ head/net-mgmt/torrus/Makefile	Sun Aug 19 07:40:53 2012	(r302753)
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	torrus
-PORTVERSION=	2.01
-PORTREVISION=	2

 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
-MASTER_SITES=	SF

 COMMENT=	The Data Series Processing Framework - think mrtg with xml configs
